category_sources: Official repository README describes it as glue between Cargo and Xcode Instruments profiling.
source_facts.description says it generates Instruments traces for Rust crates.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains prerequisites, installation, usage, options, templates, and examples.

tags_sources: Official README says it profiles Rust crates with Xcode Instruments and only works on macOS.
